programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Betrayal, infidelity and blackmail fester as plans to re-enact a Victorian prizefight turn nasty - and even DCI Barnaby finds his judgement clouded by an old friend. Midsomer Morchard prepares to welcome back local boxer John Kinsella from his world title fight victory in New York - Kinsella is returning with his ruthless and controlling promoter Frank Bishop to take part in a re-enactment of a match from 1860. When Bishop arrives, he goes to see solicitor Giles Braithwaite but instead finds the lawyer dead - meanwhile, trainer Teddy Molloy is working with another fighter called Ken Tuohy, who suspects Kinsella of a dalliance with his fiancee. There are plenty of other grudges and secrets simmering in the village, with revelations of discord, adultery, gambling and Giles's assistant Iris being accused of blackmail. When it comes time for the re-enactment, Tuohy takes the place of Kinsella's opponent and attacks Kinsella - Bishop is then found dead. Can Barnaby find the killer?

programme.desc: Lily is surprised by Peter's appearance when he turns up asking for money and advises him to approach Edna for help. Danielle tries to manipulate Eli into letting her stay.

programme.desc: Becky asks Michelle to join her and Sean on a night out in a bid to wind up Steve. A disillusioned Ken makes a decision about his book and Joe tries to reunite Tina and David.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle meets an old musician friend during her night out with Becky. Teresa's deadly scheme gets out of hand and a remorseful Ken discovers Deirdre is in no mood to forgive him.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A motorbike stunt rider becomes a target of sabotage, and Greengrass vows revenge when his beloved dog Alfred is dosed with rat poison.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. Nick finds no shortage of suspects when a philandering TV repair man is beaten up, and Greengrass infuriates Blaketon with his latest scam involving the postal service.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A missing girl and a murdered student set Vera on an investigation that triggers memories from her own childhood.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Leonard has landed himself in trouble - drunk and causing disruption in the local boozer, Larry is called in and arrests him. Leonard's spirits aren't dampened, though, and it's only when police sergeant Floyd brings up his previous stint in prison and calls him 'son' that Leonard sees red and lashes out. Eventually falling unconscious, he wakes up to find the sergeant dead in his cell with no memory of what happened - adding to the distress is the fact that the prisoner in the cell next door is having an asthma attack and screaming for his father. While Alphy is more confident of Leonard's innocence, Geordie is less afraid to stare at the truth however hard to swallow - what ensues is a locked-door mystery that could clear their friend's name or seal his fate forever. It's not looking good - there are few logical conclusions, Alphy and Geordie are slowly having to rule out other possibilities and, to cap it all, Leonard doesn't seem to want help.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy remains undecided on his birthday about whether to open a letter his mother wrote when she left him as a baby or not - he plans to spend the evening alone, but Geordie has organised a surprise treat in the form of a gig. Local up-and-comers The Velvet Jacks are playing - not only has Geordie brought their group of friends, but he's also invited Meg. Geordie thinks it's the push Alphy needs and, with everyone watching, Alphy is pressured into asking her out again - the evening is overshadowed, however, when the band's frontman is found dead with another band member standing over him. Geordie and Alphy are called on and soon uncover in-fighting between the band and their manager, alongside a love triangle with a female fan - elsewhere, Leonard attempts to stay completely off drink, Mrs C and Cathy go ahead with their plan to hoodwink the bank into giving them a loan, and Larry and Miss Scott use the case as a distraction to complete a very important matter.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Rachel is angry and upset about missing her sergeant's exam and about Nick Savage not being charged with her attempted murder. Sean tells her that he has booked the registry office, and even though she still says no, his relentless cheerfulness makes her smile. Andy insists that he is prepared to give Janet all the time and space she needs, but she then gets home to find him already there and ingratiating himself with her mother and Elise. Meanwhile, Janet learns much more than she bargained for in an interview with Geoff Hastings and Rachel and the rest of the team investigate the brutal and racially-motivated murder of a 21-year-old taxi driver.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Sally Wainwright's acclaimed drama series following the personal and professional lives of Manchester detectives DC Rachel Bailey and DS Janet Scott. The team investigates when a woman with a green face and head and dressed in a sexy policewoman's outfit is found dead in a field. DCI Gill Murray comes to the conclusion that the killer must have been the woman's lover; however, the late Susie Binns had many partners, and finding the guilty party may be tricky. The team must also work out why the body had a green face... Meanwhile, Sean has a surprise for Rachel - he wants her to meet his eight-year-old son Haydn, who is a real chip off the old block. Rachel can think of nothing worse; she struggles with this new information and what it could mean for their relationship. Also, as Andy accuses Janet of having him on, tension rises between them. Janet never intended to cause problems with Andy, but now Gill is worried that the atmosphere between the former couple might affect the team.

programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A motorbike stunt rider becomes a target of sabotage, and Greengrass vows revenge when his beloved dog Alfred is dosed with rat poison.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. Nick finds no shortage of suspects when a philandering TV repair man is beaten up, and Greengrass infuriates Blaketon with his latest scam involving the postal service.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute turns to murder after a leading light in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe, but why is someone driven to start killing? As Maureen is attacked with a broken bottle in the grounds and bleeds to death, planning officer Liz Gerrard beds Rogers and police discover that the victims of a spate of burglaries and vandalism all support a controversial development at Pelfe Chase. Barnaby then finds a catapult at Maureen's house - was she the vandal? As Election Day approaches, Jones suspects that Fiona has given Norman Swascombe free land as a bung, but the truth surprises him - meanwhile, a night of passion for Liz and Otley turns deadly... As Dr Bullard discovers that Rogers was killed using Otley's veterinary drugs, Barnaby realises that the murderer will not stop until everyone who knows the truth is silenced.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Shane discovers Danielle's stash of drugs when he searches Zak and Eli's van. Ross struggles with his feelings for Donna, and Lily tells Pearl about Peter's financial troubles.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eli gets word that Danielle has been taken to London following her arrest and decides to track her down. Donna is jealous after finding out Ross spent the night with Chas.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve lets himself into the pub to find Michelle enjoying breakfast with her friend JD. Tina exacts revenge on David at the salon and Teresa's poisoning begins to take effect.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina continues to make a scene in front of the shop's clients, much to the horror of David's bosses. Becky offers Michelle advice about Steve, and Molly loses her engagement ring.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A death in custody puts Mike's career on the line, and Greengrass and Bernie move into the taxi business and discover a novel way to supplement their income.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. An old flame of Mike's turns up in Aidensfield as Greengrass loses his heart to an aristocratic lady poacher.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. A brutal robbery at a secluded Brighton house pulls Grace and Branson into a challenging enquiry when thousands of pounds worth of beautiful antiques are stolen and the owner is left fighting for her life - the prime target, however, appears to have been an item of great sentimental value to the homeowner and her brother who is a renowned antiques dealer. This particular item has deep emotional ties to a fascinating mystery involving their father which spans back to 1960s East London and a painful night on which their life as they knew it changed forever - as Grace digs deeper into this mysterious crime, he unearths a web of ancient grudges which leads him down a murderous trail through the world of Brighton antiques in a race against time to discover who is at the heart of this robbery, recover what was taken, and bring to light answers which have been buried for many years.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Cathy and Mrs C embark on their new business venture, a fashion boutique, as the gang muck in to help with a promotional photoshoot - Cathy has even roped in one of the local girls from Swinnerton's to model, but they may have underestimated the size of the task given a leery photographer, a designer with her own agenda and haughty models. When the dead body of their photographer turns up onsite, it throws the business into disarray - their shop is a crime scene and everyone is a suspect. The victim is soon connected to the theft of a local diamond from a previous shoot - with his wallet gone, it's possible someone knew about the diamond. Elsewhere, Geordie tries to track down Alphy's mother despite Alphy not wanting to meet her - Geordie figures it can't hurt to try without Alphy knowing, but when Cathy raises a glass to Geordie finding Alphy's mum after the fashion show, this is the first that Alphy has heard of it and he is forced to react in front of everyone.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy and Geordie realise that they miss each other and stop sulking as Geordie invites Alphy to meet Fascist Wilbur Church, who has been invited to speak at the student union - there have been attempts on Wilbur's life wherever he goes, but it's Wilbur's wife who opens a parcel bomb addressed to him when one gets through. Are these attempts on his life politically motivated, or more connected to his own family? The race is on to solve the case before the killer strikes again...

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Sean surprises Rachel when he tells her that he has been in contact with her estranged mother, who would love to see her. Unable to accept that Janet has ended their affair, Andy punishes her by keeping her out of the heart of the investigation, leading to a painful row. Meanwhile, the team looks into the murder of Leon Foster; Leon's death looks like a typical gang killing at first, but the discovery that he was sexually mutilated raises suspicions that this could be a domestic murder.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A hungover Rachel learns that Nick Savage has been brutally assaulted and that she is top of the list of suspects. Scared and unable to remember what happened, she struggles to convince herself that she did not do it. Meanwhile, thinking that she has made her peace with Andy, Janet is shocked to discover that he has given her misinformation which causes Gill to miss an appointment with the coroner. Unable to find out who is messing her around, Gill tells Janet and Andy that one of them will have to leave the syndicate. At the same time, Gill is forced to re-open an accidental death case when she learns that the dead man's wife often talked about killing him.

programme.title: Robson and Jim's Fly Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Actors and best friends Robson Green and Jim Murray continue their search for big fish on another incredible fly-fishing adventure. In this episode, Robson and Jim head to the River Towy in Wales to fish for sea trout before heading to Jim's childhood holiday destination - Abersoch - to fish for bass.

programme.desc: Morocco - Senegal - Egypt - Cote d'Ivoire - A continent arriving with authority, not permission. This episode captures Africa's growing competitive strength through four nations combining recent success, depth and expectation.

programme.desc: Norway, DR Congo, Haiti and Iraq -Some journeys take longer than others. This episode explores the weight of absence - four nations shaped by delay, near misses and the long road back, where qualification carries deeper meaning.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard - in the final action-packed episode of the ninth series, Henry brings his Chopper rebuild to a glorious climax while taking time to ride the latest CCM bike, tell the story of the Honda Fireblade, and ride out on a vintage Norton ES2.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: The 19th entry in the James Bond film series. Oil tycoon Sir Robert King is trying to build a pipeline along the southern end of the Caspian Sea, rivalling the large Russian lines to the north - he is murdered by Renard, a Russian terrorist who has a bullet lodged in his brain stem that makes him immune to pain. MI6 fears that King's daughter Elektra will become Renard's next target, and so Bond is assigned to protect her, but he quickly becomes suspicious about Elektra, especially when M goes missing... Meanwhile, Bond gains aid from research scientist Christmas Jones and Russian gangster Zukovsky in tracking down Renard, who is planning a nuclear disaster that threatens all of humanity.

programme.desc: Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais' classic comedy-drama series about a group of British builders in search of employment. Oz goes back to Newcastle and finds that his wife Marjorie has moved away and that someone else is living in his flat - he goes to his son Rod's school and waits for the lad to come out, learning in the process that Marjorie is now living with an Italian named Sandro and plans to move to Italy with him and take Rod with her. In a rare moment of tenderness, Oz makes an attempt to save his marriage and get to know his son - meanwhile, Wayne has marital worries as well and Dennis seems to be getting on fine with girlfriend Christine.

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back on the road trawling Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics to restore and sell on for a tidy profit. This time they head down to Dorset to meet Tim, the owner of a delectable collection of trinkets, and come away with some choice items to bulk up their stock - they then return to the Ledbury auctions for yet more items before heading down the road to the Cotswold Oil Engine and Preservation Society's famous bring and buy sale.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: The 20th entry in the James Bond film series and Pierce Brosnan's final appearance as the secret agent. 007 is assigned to North Korea on a mission to assassinate a colonel when he is betrayed by a double agent at MI6 and captured - after enduring 14 months of torture, James is traded at the Korean border for Zao, a North Korean agent and associate of the colonel, in a prisoner exchange. Bond then escapes his subsequent MI6 detention and tracks Zao to Havana where he meets NSA agent Jinx and learns that she is working on the same case - James soon discovers that Zao is in league with the British diamond and technology tycoon Sir Gustav Graves... and that the two are planning to use a new satellite called Icarus to change the power balance of the world permanently.

programme.title: Jaque Márquez
programme.desc: Jaque Márquez transforma la temporada de MotoGP en una emocionante partida de ajedrez, donde el “rey” es Marc Márquez. Cada piloto se convierte en una pieza clave del tablero, aportando su estilo, estrategia y talento para entrar en la lucha por poner en jaque al rey.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de Tailandia
programme.desc: La espera ha terminado. El GP de Tailandia vuelve a abrir el campeonato con un ambiente espectacular y emoción en la pista. El circuito de Chang, rápido y exigente, ofrece el primer pulso real entre Ducati, KTM y las novedades del año.

programme.title: Come On Fútbol!
programme.desc: Nos adentramos de lleno en la vida de Dani Olmo, un futbolista comprometido con las causas sociales. El atacante español es integrante activo de la iniciativa 'Common Goal', una organización que se centra en ayudar a los afectados por las consecuencias de la guerra en los Balcanes. Su compromiso para mejorar el mundo es total.

programme.title: Come On Fútbol!
programme.desc: Adama Traore es un jugador diferente. Su físico fuera de lo común le ha permitido destacar hasta el punto de ser internacional con España. Pero no todo ha sido fácil para el de Hospitalet, quien también ha tenido que soportar la lacra del racismo.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de Francia
programme.desc: El Gran Premio de Francia reúne a la élite del mundial en Le Mans, un trazado histórico y técnico. Velocidad, estrategia y clima impredecible se combinan ante una afición apasionada. Marco Bezzecchi, Manuel González y Máximo Quiles llegan como líderes.

programme.desc: Sangat mengasyikan menyimak obrolan Ruben Onsu, Ivan Gunawan, Ayu Ting Ting dan Wendi Cagur dalam sebuah talkshow unik. Tidak hanya ngobrol gosip terbaru, tapi juga ada tantangan dan kejutan

programme.desc: Berkisah tentang 2 bersaudara Andin dan Elsa yang tanpa sengaja mencintai pria yang sama yaitu Nino. Hubungan mereka berdua yang tidak pernah baik jadi semakin buruk setelah Nino menikah dengan Andin

programme.title: Lapor Pak
programme.desc: Lapor Pak! mengusung konsep komedi varietas dengan sketsa dan obrolan yang mengkomedikan kasus-kasus kriminal, isu terkini, dan gosip artis dengan bintang tamu yang sering muncul dalam berbagai peran.

programme.title: Puasin
programme.desc: Program sketsa sitkom dengan tema episodik yang memperlihatkan suasana rumah, yang diselingi dengan podcast. Dimana dalam setiap episodenya akan menghadirkan bintang tamu berbeda sesuai konsep cerita

programme.title: Academy Of Pop S2
programme.desc: Perjalanan pertama Rachel sebagai anggota Now United dipenuhi dengan kegembiraan, kerja keras, dan pengalaman pertama yang tak terlupakan. Dari fitting pakaian hingga syuting MV di tempat-tempat ikonik Hong Kong.

programme.title: Rumpi (No Secret)
programme.desc: Rumpi (No Secret) bersama Feni Rose akan membahas segala hal permasalahan artis idola ataupun selebriti Indonesia, namun dengan cara yang berbeda

programme.title: Si Doel The Movie
programme.desc: 14 tahun sudah Sarah pergi tanpa kabar dan perpisahan yang tidak jelas. Rindu tersimpan dalam hati Doel yang sudah berumah tangga dengan Zaenab. Melalui Hans, Sarah meminta Doel datang ke Amsterdam untuk bertemu dengan anaknya.

programme.title: Jendela Seribu Sungai
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang tiga orang anak, yakni Bunga, Kejora, dan Arian, yang tinggal di tepi aliran Sungai Martapura, Banjarmasin. Mereka memiliki cita-cita yang tersandera oleh keinginan dan harapan orangtua.

programme.title: Little Rebels Cinema Club
programme.desc: Doddy di Parepare tahun 2008 bermimpi membuat film dan merindukan bioskop. Sebagai hadiah perpisahan, Doddy mengajak teman-temannya membuat ulang adegan film zombie menggunakan handycam milik kakaknya, Anji.

programme.title: Vidi-O-Call
programme.desc: Video Call, salah satu cara Vidi terus berkomunikasi dengan para sahabatnya selama masa pandemi. Santai namun mendalam, membeberkan segala isu dan fakta, termasuk hal-hal sensitif dari sahabat Vidi

programme.title: Apose S2

programme.title: Brata S2

programme.title: Md Series: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan
Md Series: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan
Md Series: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan
Md Sinema Spesial: Hanum & Rangga: Faith & The City
White House Down
व्हाइट हाउस डाउन
ஒயிட் ஹவுஸ் டவுன்
వైట్ హౌస్ డౌన్
व्हाईट हाऊस डाऊन
programme.desc: When terrorists suddenly invade the White House, police officer John Cale springs into action to protect his daughter and the President of the United States.
आतंकवादी अचानक व्हाइट हाउस पर हमला करते हैं, तो पुलिस अधिकारी जॉन केल अपनी बेटी और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के राष्ट्रपति की रक्षा के लिए तुरंत हरकत में आ जाता है।
பயங்கரவாதிகள் வெள்ளை மாளிகையை ஆக்கிரமித்தபோது தன் மகளையும் அமெரிக்க ஜனாதிபதியையும் பாதுகாக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும் போலீஸ்.
తీవ్రవాదులు వైట్ హౌస్ పై దాడి చేసినప్పుడు జాన్ కాలే తన కూతురిని, అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడిని కాపాడడానికి సిద్దమవుతాడు.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
बेयरली लीथल
பரேலி லேதல்
బేర్లీ లీథల్
बेअर्ली लीथल
programme.desc: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.
स्पेशल एजेंट मेगन वॉल्श, किशोरावस्था के अनुभवों को जानने के लिए अपनी मौत का नाटक करती है और हाई स्कूल में दाखिला लेती है। जल्द ही, उसे हाई स्कूल जीवन की परेशानियों का एहसास होता है।
இளமையை அனுபவிக்க தன் இறப்பை போலியாக உருவாக்கி உயர்நிலை பள்ளியில் சேர்ந்து சிக்கல்களை உணரும் சிறப்பு முகவர் மேகன் வால்ஷ்.
ఒక ప్రత్యేక ఏజెంట్ మెగాన్ వాల్ష్, ఉన్నత పాఠశాలలో చేరి, సాధారణ జీవితాన్ని గడపడానికి ఆమె మరణించినట్లు నమ్మిస్తుంది.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
वेडिंग क्रैशर्स
வெட்டிங் க்ராஷர்ஸ்
వెడ్డింగ్ క్రాషర్స్
वेडिंग क्रॅशर्स
programme.desc: Two philanderers get stuck in a situation when one of them falls for the bridesmaid at one of the weddings that they intrude.
दो व्यभिचारी गलती से एक अनजान शादी में चलते जाते हैं और वहाँ अजीब स्थिति फंस जाते हैं, जब उनमें से एक को दुल्हन की सहेली से प्यार हो जाता है।
இரண்டு காமவெறியர்களில் ஒருவர் திருமணங்களில் மணப்பெண் தோழியைக் காதலிக்கும்போது ஒரு சூழ்நிலையில் சிக்கிக் கொள்கிறார்கள்.
ఇద్దరు ఫిలాండరర్లు ఒకరు తాము చొరబడిన పెళ్లిలో ఒక తోడిపెళ్లికూతురు ప్రేమలో పడినప్పుడు ఒక వింత పరిస్థితిలో చిక్కుకుంటారు.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of Freddy Heineken
द किड्नेपिंग ऑफ फ्रेडी हेनेकेन
த கிட்னாப்பிங்க் ஆஃப் ஃப்ரெட்டி ஹெய்னகெய்ன்
ద కిడ్నాపింగ్ ఆఫ్ ఫ్రెడ్డీ హీనెకెన్
द किडनॅपिंग ऑफ फ्रेडी हेनेकेन
programme.desc: A gang of childhood friends make a plan to abduct one of the richest men on the earth and demand the largest ransom ever paid for any kidnapping.
बचपन के दोस्तों का एक गिरोह पृथ्वी पर सबसे अमीर लोगों में से एक का अपहरण करने और किसी भी अपहरण के लिए अब तक की सबसे बड़ी फिरौती की मांग करने की योजना बनाता है।
உலகின் பணக்காரர்களில் ஒருவரை கடத்தி இதுவரை செலுத்தப்படாத மிகப் பெரிய தொகையை கோர திட்டமிடும் பால்ய நண்பர்கள் குழு.
చిన్ననాటి స్నేహితులబృందం భూమిపై అత్యంత ధనవంతులలో ఒకరిని అపహరించి పెద్దమొత్తంలో డబ్బును డిమాండ్ చేయాలని ప్రథకం వేస్తుంది.

programme.title: Shazam!
शाज़म!
ஷஜாம்!
షాజమ్!
शाझम!
programme.desc: After being abandoned at a fair, Billy constantly searches for his mother. His life, however, takes a huge turn when he inherits superpowers from a powerful wizard.
एक मेले में छोड़े जाने के बाद, बिली लगातार अपनी माँ को ढूँढ़ता रहता है। हालाँकि, उसकी ज़िंदगी में तब बड़ा मोड़ आता है जब उसे एक शक्तिशाली जादूगर से महाशक्तियाँ विरासत में मिलती हैं।
தாயை பிரிந்த பில்லி சக்திவாய்ந்த மந்திரவாதியின் சக்திகளை பெறும்போது அவரது வாழ்க்கை ஒரு பெரிய திருப்பத்தை எடுக்கிறது.
జాతరలో తప్పిపోయి, తల్లి కోసం వెతుకుతున్న బిల్లీకి ఒక మాంత్రికుడు శక్తులు ప్రసాదించడంతో అతడి జీవితం మలుపు తిరుగుతుంది.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
पिरान्हा
பிரன்ஹா
పిరాన్హా 3డి
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.
भूकंप के कारण झील का तल टूट जाता है, जिससे पिरान्हा की एक प्रागैतिहासिक प्रजाति बाहर आ जाती है। मांस खाने वाली मछली के कारण भयावह घटनाएँ होती हैं, अजनबियों का एक समूह इसे रोकने के लिए एक साथ आता है।
பூகம்பத்தால் ஏரி பிளவாகி, வரலாற்றுக்கு முந்தைய காலத்திலிருந்த பிரன்ஹா இனம் வெளிவந்து தீங்கு விளைவிப்பதை தடுக்கும் குழு.
భూకంపం తర్వాత సరస్సులో నుండి విడుదల అయిన పిరాన్హాల వల్ల కలిగే రక్తపు వినాశనాన్ని ఆపడానికి అపరిచితుల బృందం జట్టుకడుతుంది.

programme.title: Johnny English
जॉनी इंग्लिश
ஜானி இங்கிலீஷ்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్
programme.desc: Johnny English, a bumbling British agent, teams up with an Interpol agent and attempts to locate a French billionaire who has stolen the crown jewels.
जॉनी इंग्लिश, एक अनाड़ी ब्रिटिश एजेंट, एक इंटरपोल एजेंट के साथ मिलकर एक फ्रांसीसी अरबपति का पता लगाने का प्रयास करता है, जिसने ताज के गहने चुरा लिए हैं।
ஜானி இங்கிலீஷ், இன்டர்போல் முகவருடன் இணைந்து, கிரீட நகைகளைத் திருடிய பிரெஞ்சு கோடீஸ்வரரைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
బ్రిటిష్ ఏజెంట్ జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్, ఇంటర్‌పోల్ ఏజెంట్‌తో కలిసి కిరీట ఆభరణాలు దొంగిలించిన ఫ్రెంచ్ బిలియనీర్‌ని కనిపెడతాడు.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation
मिशन: इम्पासबल रोग नेशन
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள் ரோக் நேஷன்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్ రోగ్ నేషన్
programme.desc: Following IMF's assimilation into the CIA, Ethan Hunt and his team face a new challenge from the Syndicate, an international rogue group determined to destroy their organisation.
आईएमएफ़ के सीआईए में शामिल होने के बाद, एथन हंट और उनकी टीम को सिंडिकेट से एक नई चुनौती मिलती है, जो एक इंटरनेशनल बदमाश ग्रुप है और उनके संगठन को खत्म करने पर तुला हुआ है।
ஈதன் ஹன்ட்டும் அவரது குழுவினரும் தங்கள் அமைப்பை அழிக்கத் தீர்மானித்த ஒரு சிண்டிகேட்டிலிருந்து சவாலை எதிர்கொள்கின்றனர்.
ఐఎంఎఫ్, సీఐఏలో కలిసిపోయిన తరువాత ఏతాన్ హంట్, అతని బృందం తమ సంస్థను నాశనం చేయాలనుకునే సిండికేట్ నుండి సవాలు ఎదుర్కొంటారు.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
गॉडज़िला: किंग ऑफ द मॉन्स्टर्स
காட்ஜில்லா: கிங் ஆஃப் த மான்ஸ்டர்ஸ்
గాడ్జిల్లా: కింగ్ ఆఫ్ ది మాన్స్టర్స్
गॉडझिला: किंग ऑफ द मॉन्स्टर्स
programme.desc: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.
पौराणिक राक्षस गिदोराह दुनिया के खात्मे के लिए रोडन और अन्य टाइटन्स को जगाता है। उन्हें हराने के लिए, क्रिप्टो-जूलॉजिकल संगठन मोनार्क, गॉडज़िला सामने लाते हैं।
அசுரன் கிடோராவால் எழுப்பப்படும் ரோடன் மற்றும் மற்ற டைட்டான்களை வீழ்த்த காட்ஜில்லாவை நாடும் கிரிப்டோ-விலங்கியல் அமைப்பு.
ప్రపంచాన్ని నాశనం చేయాలనుకునే కింగ్ ఘిడోరా, రోడాన్ లను ఓడించడానికి మోనార్క్ బృందం గాడ్జిలా, మోత్రాపై ఆధారపడాలి.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
कुंग फू हसल
குங் ஃபூ ஹஸ்ஸல்
కంగ్ ఫు హసల్
कुंग फु हसल
programme.desc: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.
एक महत्वाकांक्षी गैंगस्टर एक गिरोह का हिस्सा होने का नाटक करता है और मोहल्ले में आतंक मचाने की कोशिश करता है। हालाँकि, उसे पता नहीं होता कि वहाँ तीन मार्शल आर्ट विशेषज्ञ उसे पकड़ने के लिए तैयार हैं।
ஒரு கும்பலின் தாதாவாக நடிக்கும் ஒரு நபருக்கு, தன்னை வீழ்த்த தயாராக உள்ள மூன்று தற்காப்பு கலை நிபுணர்களை பற்றி தெரியாது.
పేరుమోసిన గ్యాంగ్‌లో భాగమైన ఔత్సాహిక గ్యాంగ్‌స్టర్ అతనికి తెలియని ముగ్గురు మార్షల్ ఆర్ట్స్ నిపుణులను ఎదుర్కొంటాడు.
एक उमेदी गुंड, परिसरात दहशत निर्माण करण्याच्या प्रयत्नात असताना, तीन मार्शल आर्ट्स तज्ञ त्याला मारण्यासाठी तयार असतात.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
नाउ यू सी मी 2
நவ் யு சீ மீ 2
నౌ యూ సీ మీ 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.
एक कुटिल तकनीकी जादूगर चार घुड़सवारों के नाम से जाने जाने वाले जादूगरों को एक शक्तिशाली चिप चुराने के लिए मजबूर करता है जो दुनिया के सभी कंप्यूटरों को नियंत्रित कर सकती है।
உலகின் அனைத்து கணினிகளையும் கட்டுப்படுத்தக்கூடிய சிப்பைத் திருட ஒரு சூனியக்காரரால் வற்புறுத்தப்படும் குதிரை வீரர்கள்.
దుర్మార్గుడైన టెక్ నిపుణుడు ప్రపంచంలో కంప్యూటర్లన్నింటిని నియత్రించగల చిప్‌ను దొంగిలించమని ఫోర్ హార్స్‌మెన్ ను పంపుతాడు.

programme.title: Baywatch
बेवॉच ()
பேவாட்ச் ()
బేవాచ్ ()
बेवॉच
programme.desc: Mitch Buchannon, the respected and beloved lifeguard of Florida's Baywatch, assembles a new team to take down a drug baron and safeguard the beach.
फ्लोरिडा के बेवॉच के सम्मानित और प्रिय लाइफगार्ड मिच बुकानन एक ड्रग तस्कर को पकड़ने और समुद्र तट की सुरक्षा के लिए एक नई टीम का गठन करते हैं।
மக்கள் கூட்டத்தை கட்டுப்படுத்தவும், பொங்கி எழும் கடல்களிலிருந்து அவர்களைப் பாதுகாக்கவும் முயலும் மிட்ச் மற்றும் குழு.
ఫ్లోరిడాలోని బేవాచ్ లైఫ్‌గార్డ్ మిచ్, డ్రగ్ బారన్‌ను పడగొట్టడానికి, బీచ్‌ను రక్షించడానికి ఒక బృందాన్ని ఏర్పాటు చేస్తాడు.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: एज ऑफ एक्सटिंक्शन
ட்ரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: ஏஜ் ஆஃப் எக்ஸ்டிங்ஷன்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: ఏజ్ ఆఫ్ ఎక్స్‌టింక్షన్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स: एज ऑफ एक्सटिंक्शन
programme.desc: Cade Yeager, a struggling single father, discovers a damaged truck which turns out to be Optimus Prime. Together with the remaining Autobots, he and his family must rise to face an impending threat.
संघर्षरत एकल पिता केड येगर को मिला एक क्षतिग्रस्त ट्रक ऑप्टिमस प्राइम निकलता है। शेष ऑटोबोट्स के साथ मिलकर, उसे और उसके परिवार को खतरे का सामना करना पड़ता है।
போராடும் ஒற்றைத் தந்தையான கேட் யேகர், ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைமாக மாறிய ஒரு சேதமடைந்த லாரியைக் கண்டுபிடிக்கிறார்.
ఒక తండ్రి కనుగొన్న ట్రక్కు ఆప్టిమస్ ప్రైమ్ గా మారుతుంది.ఆటోబాట్‌లతో కలిసి అతను,అతని కుటుంబం రాబోయే ముప్పును ఎదుర్కోవాలి.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
द हंगर गेम्स: मॉकिंगजे, पार्ट 1
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்: மாக்கிங்ஜே, பார்ட் 1
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్: మోకింగ్‌జయ్, పార్ట్ 1
programme.desc: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.
डायस्टोपियन हंगर गेम्स का अंत करने के बाद, कैटनीस एवरडीन और उसके दोस्त अपने साथी को बचाने और अपने देश को राष्ट्रपति कोरिओलेनस स्नो के नियंत्रण से मुक्त करने का प्रयास करते हैं।
ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸை முடித்த பிறகு, தோழியை மீட்டு, ஜனாதிபதியின் கட்டுப்பாட்டிலிருந்து தங்கள் நாட்டை விடுவிக்க முயலும் காட்னிஸ்.
కాట్నిస్ ఎవర్‌డీన్, ఆమె మిత్రులు తమ సహచరుడిని కాపాడి, కొరియోలానస్ స్నో నుండి తమ దేశాన్ని విడిపించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు.

programme.title: Live - The Love Laugh Live Show
द लव लाफ लिव शो
தி லவ் லாஃப் லைவ் ஷோ
ద లవ్ లాఫ్ లైవ్ షో
द लव्ह लाफ लाईव्ह शो
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता प्रमुख हस्तियों को आमंत्रित करते हैं और उनके व्यक्तिगत और व्यावसायिक जीवन के बारे में खुलकर बातचीत करते हैं।
முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் தொழில் வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி தொகுப்பாளருடன் பகிர்ந்து கொள்கிறார்கள்.
వ్యాఖ్యాత ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తులను ఆహ్వానించి, వారి వ్యక్తిగత, వృత్తిపరమైన జీవితాల గురించి నిష్కపటమైన సంభాషణలలో పాల్గొంటారు.

programme.title: Vehicle 19
वेहिकल 19
வெஹிக்கில் 19
వెహికల్ 19
व्हेहिकल 19
programme.desc: Michael Woods, a traveller and a parolee, picks up the wrong rental car to meet his wife which makes him the prime target of a group of corrupt police officers.
एक यात्री और पैरोल पर रिहा माइकल वुड्स अपनी पत्नी से मिलने के लिए किराये पर गलत कार ले लेता है, जिसके कारण वह भ्रष्ट पुलिस अधिकारियों के एक समूह का मुख्य लक्ष्य बन जाता है।
தன் மனைவியை காண தவறான வாடகை காரில் சென்று, ஊழல் போலீஸ் அதிகாரிகளின் இலக்காகும் பரோலியான பயணி மைக்கேல் வுட்ஸ்.
తప్పుడు అద్దెకారును తీసుకున్న ఒక విదేశీ యాత్రికుడు పెరోల్ పోలీసులు తనను ఆపడానికి దేనికైనా సిద్ధపడ్డారని తెలుసుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Wild for the Night
वाइल्ड फॉर द नाइट
வைல்ட் ஃபார் த நைட்
వైల్డ్ ఫర్ ద నైట్
programme.desc: When an ex-convict returns home to solve his sister's murder, the authority forces him to go undercover to help them bust illegal activities at a night club.
एक पूर्व अपराधी अपनी बहन की हत्या की गुत्थी सुलझाने के लिए घर लौटता है, तब कुछ अधिकारी उसे एक नाइट क्लब की अवैध गतिविधियों का भंडाफोड़ करने में मदद करने के लिए गुप्तचर बनने के लिए मजबूर करते हैं।
தனது சகோதரியின் கொலையாளியை கண்டுபிடிக்க முயலுகையில் நைட்கிளப்பில் சட்டவிரோத செயல்களை தடுக்க உதவும் முன்னாள் குற்றவாளி.
అధికారులు నైట్‌క్లబ్‌లో జరుగుతున్న నేరాలను పరిష్కరించడానికి ఒక మాజీ నేరస్తుడిని అండర్ కవర్ లో ఉండమని బలవంతం చేస్తారు.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
वेडिंग क्रैशर्स
வெட்டிங் க்ராஷர்ஸ்
వెడ్డింగ్ క్రాషర్స్
वेडिंग क्रॅशर्स
programme.desc: Two philanderers get stuck in a situation when one of them falls for the bridesmaid at one of the weddings that they intrude.
दो व्यभिचारी गलती से एक अनजान शादी में चलते जाते हैं और वहाँ अजीब स्थिति फंस जाते हैं, जब उनमें से एक को दुल्हन की सहेली से प्यार हो जाता है।
இரண்டு காமவெறியர்களில் ஒருவர் திருமணங்களில் மணப்பெண் தோழியைக் காதலிக்கும்போது ஒரு சூழ்நிலையில் சிக்கிக் கொள்கிறார்கள்.
ఇద్దరు ఫిలాండరర్లు ఒకరు తాము చొరబడిన పెళ్లిలో ఒక తోడిపెళ్లికూతురు ప్రేమలో పడినప్పుడు ఒక వింత పరిస్థితిలో చిక్కుకుంటారు.

programme.title: White House Down
व्हाइट हाउस डाउन
ஒயிட் ஹவுஸ் டவுன்
వైట్ హౌస్ డౌన్
व्हाईट हाऊस डाऊन
programme.desc: When terrorists suddenly invade the White House, police officer John Cale springs into action to protect his daughter and the President of the United States.
आतंकवादी अचानक व्हाइट हाउस पर हमला करते हैं, तो पुलिस अधिकारी जॉन केल अपनी बेटी और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के राष्ट्रपति की रक्षा के लिए तुरंत हरकत में आ जाता है।
பயங்கரவாதிகள் வெள்ளை மாளிகையை ஆக்கிரமித்தபோது தன் மகளையும் அமெரிக்க ஜனாதிபதியையும் பாதுகாக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும் போலீஸ்.
తీవ్రవాదులు వైట్ హౌస్ పై దాడి చేసినప్పుడు జాన్ కాలే తన కూతురిని, అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడిని కాపాడడానికి సిద్దమవుతాడు.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Fallout
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल -- फॉलआउट
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள் -- ஃபாலௌட்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్ -- ఫాలౌట్
programme.desc: After a crucial operation goes wrong, IMF Agent Ethan Hunt and his team must work together with a few allies to prevent a nuclear attack.
एक महत्वपूर्ण ऑपरेशन के विफल होने के बाद, आईएमएफ एजेंट एथन हंट और उनकी टीम को परमाणु हमले को रोकने के लिए कुछ सहयोगियों के साथ मिलकर काम करना पड़ता है।
ஐஎம்எஃப் முகவர் ஈதன் ஹன்ட் மற்றும் அவரது குழு அணு ஆயுத தாக்குதலைத் தடுக்க சில கூட்டாளிகளுடன் இணைந்து செயல்பட வேண்டும்.
ఐఎంఎఫ్ ఏజెంట్ ఈథన్ హంట్, అతని బృందం ఒక అణు దాడిని ఆపడానికి కొంతమంది మిత్రులతో కలిసి పనిచేయాల్సి వస్తుంది.

programme.title: Rush Hour 3
रश आवर थ्री
ரஷ் ஹவர் 3
రష్ అవర్ 3
programme.desc: Inspector Lee and Detective Carter arrive in Paris following an assassination attempt on Ambassador Han. There, they encounter a woman who may hold the key to uncovering the Triad's secret leaders.
राजदूत हान के हत्या के प्रयास के बाद इंस्पेक्टर ली और जासूस कार्टर पेरिस जाते हैं। वहां, वह एक महिला से मिलते हैं जिसके पास ट्रायड के गुप्त नेताओं को उजागर करने की कुंजी होती है।
தூதர் மீதான கொலை முயற்சிக்கு பின், பாரிஸுக்கு செல்லும் இருவர், இரகசியத் தலைவர்கள் பற்றி அறிந்த ஒரு பெண்ணை சந்தித்தனர்.
అంబాసిడర్ హాన్ పై హత్యాయత్నం జరిగిన తర్వాత ఇన్స్పెక్టర్ లీ మరియు డిటెక్టివ్ కార్టర్ పారిస్ కు చేరుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
स्पाइडर-मैन 3
ஸ்பைடர்-மேன் 3
స్పైడర్‌-మ్యాన్ 3
स्पाईडर-मॅन 3
programme.desc: A symbiote bonds with Peter Parker, intensifying his abilities and aggression. Now, he must face the challenges that his new powers bring while simultaneously fighting new villains.
पीटर पार्कर के साथ एक सिंबियोट जुड़ता है, जिससे उसकी क्षमताएं और आक्रामकता बढ़ जाती है। अब, उसे अपनी नई शक्तियों के साथ-साथ आगे आने वाली चुनौतियों का सामना करना होगा।
பீட்டர் பார்க்கர் என்கிற ஸ்பைடர் மேனின் மூன்றாவது வலை சாகசம்.
గ్రహాంతరవాసితోకలిసిన స్పైడర్-మ్యాన్ పీటర్ పార్కర్, సాండ్‌మ్యాన్ను ఎదుర్కొంటూ, మేరీతో విచ్చిన్నమైనబంధాన్ని కొనసాగించాలి.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
मोर्टल कॉमबैट
மார்ட்டல் கோம்பாட்
మోర్టల్ కొంబాట్
मॉर्टल कॉम्बॅट
programme.desc: To protect Earth from the Outworld, MMA fighter Cole Young sets out to find a group of fighters to defend the planet in a critical tournament.
पृथ्वी को बाहरी दुनिया से बचाने के लिए, एमएमए फाइटर कोल यंग एक महत्वपूर्ण टूर्नामेंट में ग्रह की रक्षा के लिए सेनानियों के एक समूह को खोजने निकलता है।
ஒரு முக்கியமான போட்டியில் பூமியை பாதுகாக்க போராளிகளின் குழுவைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க புறப்படும் எம்‌எம்‌ஏ ஃபைட்டர் கோல் யங்.
ఎంఎంఏ ఫైటర్ కోల్ యంగ్ ఒక క్లిష్టమైన టోర్నమెంట్‌లో భూమిని కాపాడడానికి యోధుల సమూహాన్ని కనుగొనడానికి బయలుదేరతాడు.

programme.title: Johnny English
जॉनी इंग्लिश
ஜானி இங்கிலீஷ்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్
programme.desc: Johnny English, a bumbling British agent, teams up with an Interpol agent and attempts to locate a French billionaire who has stolen the crown jewels.
जॉनी इंग्लिश, एक अनाड़ी ब्रिटिश एजेंट, एक इंटरपोल एजेंट के साथ मिलकर एक फ्रांसीसी अरबपति का पता लगाने का प्रयास करता है, जिसने ताज के गहने चुरा लिए हैं।
ஜானி இங்கிலீஷ், இன்டர்போல் முகவருடன் இணைந்து, கிரீட நகைகளைத் திருடிய பிரெஞ்சு கோடீஸ்வரரைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
బ్రిటిష్ ఏజెంట్ జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్, ఇంటర్‌పోల్ ఏజెంట్‌తో కలిసి కిరీట ఆభరణాలు దొంగిలించిన ఫ్రెంచ్ బిలియనీర్‌ని కనిపెడతాడు.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: राइज़ ऑफ़ द बीस्ट्स
டிரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: ரைஸ் ஆஃப் தி பீஸ்ட்ஸ்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: రైజ్ ఆఫ్ ది బీస్ట్స్
programme.desc: As a nefarious force imperils Earth, an unlikely alliance forms between Optimus Prime's Autobots and the mighty Maximals, aided by two humans to safeguard mankind's future.
एक दुष्ट शक्ति पृथ्वी को खतरे में डालती है तब ऑप्टिमस प्राइम के ऑटोबोट्स और शक्तिशाली मैक्सिमल्स के बीच एक अनोखा गठबंधन बनता है, जिसमें मानवता के भविष्य की रक्षा के लिए दो मनुष्यों की मदद ली जाती है।
ஒரு தீய சக்தியிலிருந்து பூமியைப் பாதுகாக்க ஆட்டோபாட்களும் மாக்சிமல்களும் இரண்டு மனிதர்களுடன் இணைந்து செயல்படுகின்றன.
ఆప్టిమస్ ప్రైమ్ ఆటోబాట్‌లు, మాక్సిమల్స్ ఇద్దరు మానవులతో కలిసి ఒక దుష్ట శక్తి నుండి భూమిని కాపాడాలనుకుంటాయి.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
टॉम एण्ड जेरी
டாம் அண்ட் ஜெர்ரி
టామ్ అండ్ జెర్రీ
टॉम अ‍ॅन्ड जेरी
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.
एक शरारती चूहा जैरी, एक आलीशान होटल में शरण लेता है जहाँ एक शादी होने वाली है। उससे छुटकारा पाने के लिए, इवेंट प्लानर में से एक जैरी के बिल्ली के समान प्रतिद्वंद्वी टॉम को काम पर रखता है।
திருமணம் நடக்கவுள்ள ஆடம்பர ஹோட்டலில் தங்கும் குறும்புக்கார ஜெர்ரியை விரட்ட அதன் எதிரியான டாமை அழைக்கும் பணியாளர்.
వివాహం జరగనున్న ఒక హోటల్ లో చేరిన జెర్రీని వదిలించుకోడానికి ఈవెంట్ ప్లానర్‌లలో ఒకరు దాని ప్రత్యర్థి టామ్‌ని నియమిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Shazam!
शाज़म!
ஷஜாம்!
షాజమ్!
शाझम!
programme.desc: After being abandoned at a fair, Billy constantly searches for his mother. His life, however, takes a huge turn when he inherits superpowers from a powerful wizard.
एक मेले में छोड़े जाने के बाद, बिली लगातार अपनी माँ को ढूँढ़ता रहता है। हालाँकि, उसकी ज़िंदगी में तब बड़ा मोड़ आता है जब उसे एक शक्तिशाली जादूगर से महाशक्तियाँ विरासत में मिलती हैं।
தாயை பிரிந்த பில்லி சக்திவாய்ந்த மந்திரவாதியின் சக்திகளை பெறும்போது அவரது வாழ்க்கை ஒரு பெரிய திருப்பத்தை எடுக்கிறது.
జాతరలో తప్పిపోయి, తల్లి కోసం వెతుకుతున్న బిల్లీకి ఒక మాంత్రికుడు శక్తులు ప్రసాదించడంతో అతడి జీవితం మలుపు తిరుగుతుంది.

programme.title: Absolute Deception
एब्सोल्यूट डिसेप्शन
அப்சல்யூட் டிசெப்ஷன்
ఆబ్సొల్యూట్ డిసెప్షన్
अॅब्सोल्यूट डिसेप्शन
programme.desc: Rebecca Scott, a widowed reporter, teams up with an FBI agent to uncover the mystery of her husband's death. However, things take a turn when they are targeted by unknown enemies.
एक विधवा पत्रकार रेबेका स्कॉट अपने पति की मौत का रहस्य उजागर करने के लिए एक एफबीआई एजेंट से हाथ मिलाती। हालात बदलते हैं।, जब उनपर अज्ञात दुश्मनों द्वारा हमला किया जाता है।
கணவரின் மர்ம மரணத்தை ஆராய எஃப்‌பி‌ஐ முகவருடன் இணையும் விதவையான நிருபர் ரெபேக்கா ஸ்காட், தெரியாத எதிரிகளின் இலக்காகிறார்.
రెబెక్కా స్కాట్, ఒక వితంతువు రిపోర్టర్, తన భర్త మరణ రహస్యాన్ని వెలికితీసేందుకు ఎఫ్బిఐ ఏజెంట్‌తో జతకట్టింది.

programme.title: Pay Day
पे डे
பே டே
పే డే
पे डे
programme.desc: A bricklayer's plans of having a fun weekend go for a toss when he finds it difficult to reach home during a downpour. When he finally reaches home, he realises that his wife is angry with him.
एक मिस्त्री की सप्ताहांत बिताने की योजनायें तब धरी की धरी रह जाती हैं जब उसे बारिश में घर पहुँचने में मुश्किल होती है। जब वह आखिरकार घर पहुँचता है, तो उसे पता चलता है कि उसकी पत्नी उससे नाराज़ है।
வாரக்கடைசியை கொண்டாடும் கொத்தனாரின் திட்டம் பயங்கர மழையால் தோல்வியடைகிறது. அதனால் அவரது மனைவி அவர் மீது கோபமடைகிறாள்.
వారాంతాన్ని సరదాగా గడపాలని ఒక ఇటుక పనివాడు చేసే ప్రణాళికలు, భారీ వర్షంలో ఇంటికి చేరుకోవడం కష్టంగా మారుతుంది.

programme.title: Mune
मून, ले गार्डियन डे ला लून
ம்யூன்
మునే
मुन
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it from him.
सूर्य का पूर्व संरक्षक नेक्रॉस दुष्ट बन उसे चुरा लेता है। लेकिन मुने, ग्लिम और सोहोन, तीनों दोस्त उसे वापस पाने के लिए मिलकर काम करते हैं।
சூரியனை திருடிய அதன் முன்னாள் பாதுகாவலர் நெக்ராஸிடமிருந்து நண்பர்கள் மூனே, க்ளிம் மற்றும் சோஹோன் சூரியனை மீட்க வேண்டும்.
మునే, గ్లిమ్, సోహోన్ లు సూర్యుడిని దొంగిలించిన మాజీ సంరక్షకుడు నెక్రాస్ నుండి దానిని తిరిగి పొందడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు.

programme.title: The November Man
द नवम्बर मेन
த நவம்பர் மேன்
ది నవంబర్ మ్యాన్
द नोव्हेंबर मॅन
programme.desc: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.
एक पूर्व सी.आई.ए. अधिकारी पीटर को एक मूल्यवान गवाह, एलिस की सुरक्षा का कार्य सौंपा गया है, जिसके पास रूसी राष्ट्रपति पद के उम्मीदवार के बारे में गुप्त जानकारी है।
முன்னாள் சிஐஏ அதிகாரியான பீட்டர், ரஷிய ஜனாதிபதி வேட்பாளர் பற்றி இரகசிய தகவல்களை அறிந்த ஆலிஸை பாதுகாக்க வேண்டும்.
మాజీ సిఐఏ ఏజెంట్ పీటర్ రష్యా అధ్యక్ష అభ్యర్థి గురించి రహస్యంగా తెలిసిన సాక్షి అయిన ఆలిస్‌ను రక్షించాలి.

programme.title: Troy
ट्रॉय
ட்ராய்
ట్రాయ్
ट्रॉय
programme.desc: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.
ट्रोजन के राजकुमार पेरिस का मेनेलॉस की पत्नी हेलेन के साथ प्रेम प्रसंग होता है, और वह उसे अपने साथ ले जाने का फैसला करता है। बाद में, मेनेलॉस का भाई इसी बहाने ट्रॉय शहर के खिलाफ युद्ध छेड़ देता है।
ட்ரோஜன் இளவரசரான பாரிஸ், மெனலஸின் மனைவி ஹெலனுடன் காதல் கொண்ட பிறகு, அவளை தன்னுடன் அழைத்துச் செல்ல முடிவு செய்கிறார்.
ట్రోజన్ యువరాజు పారిస్, మెనెలాస్ భార్య హెలెన్‌ని తనతో తీసుకెళ్లగా, అదే అదనుగా మెనెలాస్ సోదరుడు ట్రాయ్ పై దండెత్తుతాడు.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
द एंग्री बर्ड्स मूवी 2
த ஆங்க்ரீ பர்ட்ஸ் மூவீ 2
ది యాంగ్రీ బర్డ్స్ మూవీ 2
द अँग्री बर्ड्स मूव्ही 2
programme.desc: After years of being at odds with each other, the birds and the pigs are forced to work together when a common enemy attempts to drive them away from their homes.
बर्ड और पिग्गी आइलैंड्स पर खतरा मंडरा रहा है क्योंकि ईगल आइलैंड का नेता, ज़ेटा उनके आइलैंड पर कब्जा करना चाहता है। रेड को ज़ेटा को विफल करने और अपना घर बचाने के लिए लियोनार्ड की टीम से जुड़ना होगा।
ஈகிள் தீவின் தலைவரான ஜீட்டாவின் திட்டங்களை முறியடித்து தங்கள் வீடுகளை காப்பாற்ற போராடும் ரெட் மற்றும் லியோனார்ட்.
తమ బర్డ్, పిగ్గీ ద్వీపాలను ఈగల్ ఐలాండ్ నాయకుడు జెటా బారి నుండి కాపాడడానికి రెడ్ లెనార్డ్ బృందంతో చేతులు కలపాలి.
ईगल आयलंडचा नेता, झेटा बर्ड व पिगी आयलंडवर कब्जा करू पाहता रेडला आपले घर वाचवण्यासाठी लियोनार्डशी हात मिळवावा लागतो.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
नाउ यू सी मी 2
நவ் யு சீ மீ 2
నౌ యూ సీ మీ 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.
एक कुटिल तकनीकी जादूगर चार घुड़सवारों के नाम से जाने जाने वाले जादूगरों को एक शक्तिशाली चिप चुराने के लिए मजबूर करता है जो दुनिया के सभी कंप्यूटरों को नियंत्रित कर सकती है।
உலகின் அனைத்து கணினிகளையும் கட்டுப்படுத்தக்கூடிய சிப்பைத் திருட ஒரு சூனியக்காரரால் வற்புறுத்தப்படும் குதிரை வீரர்கள்.
దుర్మార్గుడైన టెక్ నిపుణుడు ప్రపంచంలో కంప్యూటర్లన్నింటిని నియత్రించగల చిప్‌ను దొంగిలించమని ఫోర్ హార్స్‌మెన్ ను పంపుతాడు.

programme.title: Rambo III
रेम्बो 3
ராம்போ III
రాంబో III
रॅम्बो III
programme.desc: When his former superior, Colonel Samuel, asks him to join him on a special mission in Afghanistan, Rambo declines. However, when he is held hostage and tortured, Rambo decides to step in.
सीनियर कर्नल सैमुअल, रैम्बो को अफ़गानिस्तान में एक स्पेशल मिशन पर चलने के लिए कहते हैं, तब वह मना कर देता है। लेकिन, जब उसे बंधक बनाकर टॉर्चर किया जाता है, तब रैम्बो मदद करने का फ़ैसला करता है।
ஆப்கானிஸ்தானில் பணியில் தன்னுடன் சேரும்படி கேட்டபோது மறுத்த ராம்போ, சாமுவேல் பிணைக்கைதியான பிறகு, மீட்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
తనని ఆఫ్ఘనిస్తాన్‌లో ఒక ప్రత్యేక మిషన్‌లో చేరమని కోరిన కల్నల్ శామ్యూల్ ని బంధించడంతో రాంబో రంగంలోకి దిగుతాడు.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: राइज़ ऑफ़ द बीस्ट्स
டிரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: ரைஸ் ஆஃப் தி பீஸ்ட்ஸ்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: రైజ్ ఆఫ్ ది బీస్ట్స్
programme.desc: As a nefarious force imperils Earth, an unlikely alliance forms between Optimus Prime's Autobots and the mighty Maximals, aided by two humans to safeguard mankind's future.
एक दुष्ट शक्ति पृथ्वी को खतरे में डालती है तब ऑप्टिमस प्राइम के ऑटोबोट्स और शक्तिशाली मैक्सिमल्स के बीच एक अनोखा गठबंधन बनता है, जिसमें मानवता के भविष्य की रक्षा के लिए दो मनुष्यों की मदद ली जाती है।
ஒரு தீய சக்தியிலிருந்து பூமியைப் பாதுகாக்க ஆட்டோபாட்களும் மாக்சிமல்களும் இரண்டு மனிதர்களுடன் இணைந்து செயல்படுகின்றன.
ఆప్టిమస్ ప్రైమ్ ఆటోబాట్‌లు, మాక్సిమల్స్ ఇద్దరు మానవులతో కలిసి ఒక దుష్ట శక్తి నుండి భూమిని కాపాడాలనుకుంటాయి.

programme.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
घोस्ट राइडर: स्पिरिट ऑफ वेंजीयन्स
கோஸ்ட் ரைடர்: ஸ்பிரிட் ஆஃப் வெஞ்ஜன்ஸ்
ఘోస్ట్ రైడర్: స్పిరిట్ ఆఫ్ వెంజెన్స్
घोस्ट रायडर: स्पिरिट ऑफ व्हेंजन्स
programme.desc: A French monk seeks out the Ghost Rider, a superpowered antihero, for help in protecting a young boy who is being pursued by the Devil and his minions.
एक फ्रांसीसी भिक्षु, शैतान और उसके अनुयायियों द्वारा पीछा किए जा रहे एक युवा लड़के की रक्षा में मदद के लिए एक महाशक्तिशाली प्रतिनायक घोस्ट राइडर की तलाश करते हैं।
பிரஞ்சு துறவி பிசாசு மற்றும் அவனது கூட்டாளிகளால் துரத்தப்படும் சிறுவனை பாதுகாப்பதில் உதவிக்காக கோஸ்ட் ரைடரை நாடுகிறார்.
ఒక ఫ్రెంచ్ సన్యాసి దెయ్యం,అతని సేవకులు వెంబడిస్తున్న ఒక పిల్లవాడిని రక్షించడంలో సహాయం కోసం ఘోస్ట్ రైడర్ ను ఆశ్రయిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
कुंग फू हसल
குங் ஃபூ ஹஸ்ஸல்
కంగ్ ఫు హసల్
कुंग फु हसल
programme.desc: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.
एक महत्वाकांक्षी गैंगस्टर एक गिरोह का हिस्सा होने का नाटक करता है और मोहल्ले में आतंक मचाने की कोशिश करता है। हालाँकि, उसे पता नहीं होता कि वहाँ तीन मार्शल आर्ट विशेषज्ञ उसे पकड़ने के लिए तैयार हैं।
ஒரு கும்பலின் தாதாவாக நடிக்கும் ஒரு நபருக்கு, தன்னை வீழ்த்த தயாராக உள்ள மூன்று தற்காப்பு கலை நிபுணர்களை பற்றி தெரியாது.
పేరుమోసిన గ్యాంగ్‌లో భాగమైన ఔత్సాహిక గ్యాంగ్‌స్టర్ అతనికి తెలియని ముగ్గురు మార్షల్ ఆర్ట్స్ నిపుణులను ఎదుర్కొంటాడు.
एक उमेदी गुंड, परिसरात दहशत निर्माण करण्याच्या प्रयत्नात असताना, तीन मार्शल आर्ट्स तज्ञ त्याला मारण्यासाठी तयार असतात.

programme.title: Black Adam
ब्लैक एडम
பிளாக் ஆடம்
బ్లాక్ ఆడమ్
ब्लॅक ॲडम
programme.desc: After being granted the divine power of the Egyptian Gods and spending almost 5000 years in a guardhouse, Black Adam is freed and decides to unleash his style of justice on the world.
मिस्र के देवताओं की दिव्य शक्ति प्राप्त करने और लगभग 5000 साल एक गार्डहाउस में बिताने के बाद, ब्लैक एडम मुक्त हो जाता है और दुनिया पर अपनी न्याय शैली को लागू करने का फैसला करता है।
தெய்வீக சக்திகள் வழங்கப்பட்டு, அதற்காக சிறையில் அடைக்கப்பட்ட பிளாக் ஆடம் நவீன உலகில் தனது கோபத்தை வெளிப்படுத்துகிறார்.
దాదాపు 5000 ఏళ్లు ఒక గార్డుహౌస్‌లో గడిపిన తర్వాత విముక్తి పొందిన బ్లాక్ ఆడమ్ తన న్యాయశైలిని ప్రపంచానికి తెలియజేస్తాడు.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
द ट्रांसपोर्टर रिफ्यूल्ड
த ட்ரான்ஸ்போர்ட் ரீஃப்யூயல்ட்
ద ట్రాన్స్‌పోర్టర్ రీఫ్యూయల్డ్
द ट्रान्सपोर्टर रिफ्युएल
programme.desc: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.
पूर्व सिपाही फ्रैंक मार्टिन, महिला और उसके साथियों द्वारा एक अनुबंध को पूरा करने के लिए काम पर रखा जाता है। हालाँकि, जल्द ही उसे एक रूसी अपराधी को गिराने के लिए उनके साथ सेना में शामिल होना पड़ता है।
ஒப்பந்தத்தை நிறைவேற்ற ஒரு பெண் மற்றும் கூட்டாளிகளால் பணியமர்த்தப்படும் ஃபிராங்க், ரஷ்ய குற்ற பிரபுவை வீழ்த்த வேண்டும்.
ఫ్రాంక్ మార్టిన్, మాజీ కిరాయి సైనికుడు, ఒక ఒప్పందాన్ని నెరవేర్చడానికి ఒక మహిళ మరియు ఆమె సహచరులు నియమించుకున్నారు.

programme.desc: Paul, who's 60, has been in a collision with a van. Four-year-old Jeremy, who has a series of chronic conditions including microcephaly and epilepsy, is struggling to breathe. (S17 Ep8) [AD,S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: On Harry and Meghan's royal wedding day, patients including David, who's fallen from a ladder, and John, who's also had a fall, and their relatives reflect on love and commitment. (S18 Ep1) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The camping connoisseurs visit the stunning setting of Masons Campsite, Skipton, where they have an exhilarating stay involving river swimming, fishing, cricket and croissants. (S2 Ep3) [S]

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: At a Yorkshire textile mill, Simon O'Brien repurposes a trolley into a glass-top coffee table, while Henry Cole struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike. (S3 Ep10) [AD,S]

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien builds a table from rafters and gives a 1970s camper van a new lease of life. Henry Cole hankers after an American tractor and a Royal Enfield motorbike and sidecar. (S3 Ep11) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first hosts, Ronnie and Steph, welcome their rivals to the Inn at the Park in Aberdeen, where one guest's culinary background raises the stakes at breakfast. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shauna and Fiona host at Ingliston Country Club in Renfrewshire, where dated décor and a delayed breakfast lead to feedback that causes a storm in a teacup. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Allard host at the B&B they built themselves, 1692 Wasdale, in the Lake District. Shauna and Fiona think it's picture-perfect, but John has concerns about cleanliness. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Lynbar Hotel, where confident John boasts that he serves the best breakfast in Blackpool. But do his guests agree? [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores, before the winner is announced. [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Derby. Wrestling promoter Dale combines his passions - wrestling and cooking - on a night featuring the 'Big Daddy of all menus' and a surprise pro wrestling match in the garden. (Ep1/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Derby. Business support manager Jo-Anna plans to reveal her 'princess fairytale dreamer' side with a glitz and glam dinner party including poetry, dolls' houses and ballgowns. (Ep2/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Derby. PR whizz Beth steps into the spotlight with a hit-and-miss Middle Eastern menu, on a night of celebrity lookalikes and cheesy chat-up lines. (Ep3/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Derby. Mum-of-three Ondine hosts with a Greek holiday-themed menu and some unique entertainment. But has she broken David's 'golden rule of hummus'? (Ep4/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Derby. Triathlete David plans a fine-dining menu, accompanied by a workout class. But his small portions leave his guests wanting more. (Ep5/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Farmer's daughter Mandy and her friend Anny host first at Laskill Country House in Helmsley. Mandy bigs up her banger qualifications, but at breakfast she fails to crack Chris's order. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris and his spiritual friend Rammy hope that value for money and a Yorkshire pudding competition will bag them the prize at The Swan Hotel in Telford. But one guest has a rude awakening. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Colin and his son Ben hope to wow their rivals with their 81-room country pile, Scalford Hall Hotel, in Melton Mowbray. But guests Chris and Rammy think that Colin is playing games. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to The Abbey Hotel in Battle, East Sussex, run by youngsters Charlie and Lauren. But Colin and Ben feel the squeeze, and Chris and Rammy get into a sticky situation. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time. There are recriminations and accusations as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced. [S]

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Stuart and Lara, who live 100 miles apart, to find a home in Buckinghamshire. Phil Spencer takes Randhir and Sheetal on an urgent search in Berkshire. (S27 Ep2/9) [AD,S]

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the seventh heat, as five more players are put through their paces. Who will win Original PopMaster and can they smash Three in Ten? (S3 Ep7) [S]

programme.title: Ancient Greece by Train with...
programme.desc: ...Alice Roberts: In Athens, Alice explores the origins of theatre and the role of Thespis - who liked a drink or two. And Greece's culture minister discusses the Elgin Marbles. (Ep2) [AD,S]

programme.title: Castle Secrets
programme.desc: Gateway to Hell; Monk's Curse; the Queen and the Concubine: In Houska Castle, a gothic chapel is erected over a supposed gateway to hell. (Ep2) [AD,S]

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a midwife who's in agony, a man whose jaw is trembling and filling with fluid, and a woman with a wound that won't stop bleeding. (S7 Ep2) [S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Emergency consultant Ahmed rushes to save the life of a woman with an abdominal aortic aneurysm while making sure the other patients in busy resus get the attention they need too. (S18 Ep2) [AD,S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tania, who's 40, is in resus after being knocked over by a car. Edwin, who's 77, is rushed to A&E bleeding from a tumour. And footballer Lilli has damaged her eye socket. (S18 Ep3) [AD,S]

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a midwife who's in agony, a man whose jaw is trembling and filling with fluid, and a woman with a wound that won't stop bleeding. (S7 Ep2) [S]

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The campers visit Ghyll House Farm in Ilkley. Sheep shearing and lamb feeding are new experiences for the critics, but will they embrace the campsite's rural charm? (S2 Ep4) [S]

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Lowestoft, Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign, while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa. (S3 Ep12) [AD,S]

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The boys rummage through the hangar of a Vulcan bomber. Henry Cole restores a cockpit seat, while Simon O'Brien attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table. (S3 Ep13) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Environmentally-friendly couple Ian and Jayne host first, at The School House B&B in Pencader, Wales. At dinner, eyebrows are raised at two straight-talking guests. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Jo welcome their rivals to Cathedral 73 in Cardiff. Their guests are wowed by the glamorous rooms, but the extra charges for parking and breakfast prove hard to swallow. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Golfer Raj hosts at the Leafy Suburban B&B in Hertfordshire, where the house rules include removing your shoes at the door. Neil and Jo aren't impressed by a surprise visitor in their bed. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to The Wellington Inn in Hertfordshire, where resources manager Felicity Rainbow's spiritual approach to hosting includes cleansing the rooms' auras. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores. After bitter rebukes, the winner is announced. [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Manchester. DJ Dom - aka Tracksuit Dom - hosts his first-ever dinner party, with a menu inspired by the 'Madchester' music scene, but has to call on a celebrity pal to bail him out. (Ep1/5) [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Manchester. After Dom's disastrous dinner, trainee barrister Sasha hopes to raise the bar with a Chinese-Pakistani fusion menu - served on plastic plates. (Ep2/5) [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Manchester. Nurse Katherine makes 'quick fix' food, including a chorizo and chickpea main, and pulls out all the stops for her entertainment with a brass band in her back garden. (Ep3/5) [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Manchester. Redcoat-turned-barber Danny hosts a Bulgarian evening in homage to his wife and gets emotional in front of his guests. (Ep4/5) [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Manchester. Glam goth and wannabe vampire Maria plans an East-meets-West menu and devilish dancing. But Tracksuit Dom serves the biggest surprise when he turns up in a suit and tie. (Ep5/5) [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mandi and Paul pride themselves on their high standards at Oaklea Barns Guest House on Merseyside. But Ian is puzzled by plastic-covered lampshades. And Mark and Natalie have a loose loo. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave and Sanchia host the second visit, at The Guest House Worsthorne in Lancashire. Their guests are charmed by the 300-year-old cottage, but there are cleanliness concerns. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Sleeperdorm Backpacker Hotel in Newcastle, Ian hopes his guests will leave their designer gear at the door and bunk up in his cheap and cheerful dorms. But things turn sour over dinner. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to The Parsonage Hotel and Spa in York, where Mark and Natalie hope to impress their guests with their country manor, complete with pub, spa and restaurant. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid. After some tit-for-tat feedback, the winner is announced. [S]

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Andy and Jenny search for their first home near Warrington. Phil Spencer is with Margot, who hopes to find a forever home in the seaside town of Crosby. (S27 Ep3/9) [AD,S]

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts, as the last set of players are put through their paces to see who has the best pop knowledge. Who will secure the final place in the Grand Final? (S3 Ep8) [S]

programme.title: New: Kevin McCloud's Listed...
programme.desc: ...Britain: Brand new series: From a cathedral's ruins that were kept standing to rescuing a masterpiece, we explore the places that survived because losing them was unthinkable. (Ep3/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Xintong, who's 28, has been flung from a go-kart at speed. Doctors are concerned there may be damage to her spine. Gary, who's 58, has trapped his finger in two shopping trolleys. (S18 Ep4) [AD,S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Jeremy, who's 71, arrives at St George's in an air ambulance after crashing his bicycle at speed, and café worker Amy comes to the rescue of complete stranger James. (S18 Ep6) [AD,S]

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain
programme.desc: Brand new series: From a cathedral's ruins that were kept standing to rescuing a masterpiece from collapse, we explore the places that survived because losing them was unthinkable. (Ep3/5) [AD,S]

திரைப்படங்களில் சிறந்தவை.
సినిమాలలో ఉత్తమమైనది.
दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.

दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.

programme.title: Big Eyes
बिग आइज़
பிக் ஐஸ்
బిగ్ ఐస్
बिग आईज
programme.desc: The husband of Margaret Keane, a phenomenal painter, wrongfully claims credit for her works and enjoys her success until a legal battle between the two reveals the truth to the world.
मार्गरेट कीन, एक प्रसिद्ध चित्रकार, अपने पति द्वारा उसकी कलाकृति का श्रेय लेने के बाद अपनी प्रसिद्धि को पुनः प्राप्त करने के लिए संघर्ष करती है।
தன் கலைப்படைப்புக்கான பெருமையை தன் கணவர் பெற்ற பிறகு தன் புகழை மீட்டெடுக்க போராடும் புகழ்பெற்ற ஓவியரான மார்கரெட் கீன்.
మార్గరెట్ కీనే చిత్రాలను తన చిత్రాలుగా చెప్పుకొని పేరు సంపాదించిన ఆమె భర్తకు, ఆమెకు మధ్య న్యాయ పోరాటం మొదలవుతుంది.

programme.title: Live - Mandira Bedi; The Love Laugh Live Show
द लव लाफ लिव शो
தி லவ் லாஃப் லைவ் ஷோ
ద లవ్ లాఫ్ లైవ్ షో
द लव्ह लाफ लाईव्ह शो
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता प्रमुख हस्तियों को आमंत्रित करते हैं और उनके व्यक्तिगत और व्यावसायिक जीवन के बारे में खुलकर बातचीत करते हैं।
முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் தொழில் வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி தொகுப்பாளருடன் பகிர்ந்து கொள்கிறார்கள்.
వ్యాఖ్యాత ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తులను ఆహ్వానించి, వారి వ్యక్తిగత, వృత్తిపరమైన జీవితాల గురించి నిష్కపటమైన సంభాషణలలో పాల్గొంటారు.
